title: Sandbox Runner with Denylist and Path Jail

questions.question: Before reading the lesson: what is the strongest reason a sandbox checks argv shapes for interpreter invocations like python3 -c?
options: Interpreters are slow and waste agent budget.
An interpreter with -c is a shell call by another name and bypasses the executable denylist.
Interpreters cannot be safely sandboxed at all.
The model writes better code without them.
questions.explanation: python3 -c, bash -c, node -e, and friends are functionally identical to giving the model a shell. Blocking the executable name is not enough.
questions.question_zh: 在阅读课程之前: 为什么 sandbox 要检查像 python3 -c 这样的解释器调用的 argv 形态?
options_zh: 解释器很慢,会浪费 agent 预算。
带 -c 的解释器其实是另一种形式的 shell 调用,会绕过可执行文件 denylist。
解释器根本没法被安全 sandbox。
没有解释器时模型代码写得更好。
questions.explanation_zh: python3 -c、bash -c、node -e 等等在功能上等同于把 shell 交给模型。仅拦截可执行文件名是不够的。

questions.question: The sandbox is configured with project_root=/work. A path argument arrives as ./src/main.py. How is the jail check performed?
options: Literal string prefix match against /work.
os.path.realpath of the joined absolute path is checked for a /work prefix.
The sandbox refuses every relative path.
The sandbox spawns the subprocess and checks the working directory after the fact.
questions.explanation: realpath resolves symlinks. A literal prefix check is bypassed by a symlink inside the project root pointing outside. realpath plus prefix-or-equal is the safe check.
questions.question_zh: Sandbox 配置 project_root=/work。一个路径参数以 ./src/main.py 到达。jail 检查是怎么做的?
options_zh: 对 /work 做字面字符串前缀匹配。
对拼接后的绝对路径求 os.path.realpath,再检查是否以 /work 为前缀。
Sandbox 拒绝任何相对路径。
Sandbox 先启动子进程,再事后检查工作目录。
questions.explanation_zh: realpath 会解析符号链接。字面前缀匹配可以被项目根内、指向外部的符号链接绕过。realpath 加「前缀或相等」才是安全的检查。

questions.question: A SandboxResult comes back with denied=True, timed_out=False, exit_code=-100. What is the canonical interpretation?
options: The subprocess started and was killed by SIGKILL.
The sandbox never spawned the subprocess; the call was refused before exec.
The subprocess returned -100 explicitly.
The wall-clock timeout fired.
questions.explanation: The sentinel exit_code -100 paired with denied=True means the sandbox short-circuited before subprocess.run was called.
questions.question_zh: 一个 SandboxResult 返回 denied=True、timed_out=False、exit_code=-100。规范的解读是什么?
options_zh: 子进程已启动并被 SIGKILL 终止。
Sandbox 从未派生子进程; 调用在 exec 前被拒绝。
子进程显式返回了 -100。
Wall-clock 超时被触发。
questions.explanation_zh: exit_code -100 与 denied=True 配合的哨兵值,表示 sandbox 在 subprocess.run 之前就短路了。

questions.question: Why does the sandbox prefer shell=False by default and refuse shell metacharacters?
options: shell=True is slower in CPython.
Shell parsing exposes the entire shell DSL to the model, which is the surface the sandbox is trying to shrink.
subprocess does not accept shell=True on macOS.
It makes the test suite simpler.
questions.explanation: shell=True turns argv into a shell-interpreted string. Pipes, redirects, command substitution, and globbing all become available. The sandbox cannot meaningfully refuse a payload once shell parsing runs.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 sandbox 默认 shell=False 并拒绝 shell 元字符?
options_zh: shell=True 在 CPython 上更慢。
Shell 解析把整个 shell DSL 暴露给模型,而 sandbox 想要的恰恰是收缩这个攻击面。
subprocess 在 macOS 上不接受 shell=True。
为了让测试套件更简单。
questions.explanation_zh: shell=True 把 argv 变成被 shell 解释的字符串。管道、重定向、命令替换、glob 全部可用。shell 解析一旦发生,sandbox 就无法有效拒绝任何 payload。

questions.question: You want to add a per-process memory limit to the sandbox. The lesson's sandbox does not implement this. What is the correct next step?
options: Use os.setrlimit(RLIMIT_AS) in a preexec_fn passed to subprocess.run.
Add the limit to the denylist as a string.
Increase the wall-clock timeout to compensate.
Skip it: a denylist is sufficient for memory bombs.
questions.explanation: subprocess.run accepts preexec_fn (POSIX) or a similar mechanism. setrlimit(RLIMIT_AS) caps the address space of the child. The sandbox in this lesson does not ship this; lesson 29's end-to-end demo discusses how to layer container-level limits on top.
questions.question_zh: 你想给 sandbox 加上单进程内存限制。本节的 sandbox 没实现这个。正确的下一步是什么?
options_zh: 在传给 subprocess.run 的 preexec_fn 中调用 os.setrlimit(RLIMIT_AS)。
把这个限制作为字符串加到 denylist。
提高 wall-clock 超时来抵消。
跳过它: denylist 足够防住内存炸弹。
questions.explanation_zh: subprocess.run 接受 preexec_fn (POSIX) 或类似机制。setrlimit(RLIMIT_AS) 限制子进程的地址空间。本节 sandbox 没出货这一点; 第 29 课的端到端 demo 讨论如何在其上叠加容器级限制。

questions.question: The model invokes the sandbox with argv=['cat', 'src/../src/main.py']. The file exists under project_root. Should the call pass the path jail?
options: No, any .. in a path is an automatic refusal.
Yes: realpath collapses src/../src to src and the resolved path is inside project_root.
No: argv is rejected by the regex gate before the sandbox sees it.
It depends on whether the user is root.
questions.explanation: realpath normalises the path. The sandbox does not blanket-refuse .. tokens; it checks the resolved target. This is intentional: legitimate paths sometimes go through .. legitimately.
questions.question_zh: 模型用 argv=['cat', 'src/../src/main.py'] 调用 sandbox。该文件在 project_root 下确实存在。这次调用应当通过 path jail 吗?
options_zh: 不应该,任何路径中出现 .. 都自动拒绝。
应该: realpath 把 src/../src 折叠成 src,解析后的目标在 project_root 内。
不应该: argv 在抵达 sandbox 前被正则 gate 拒绝。
看用户是不是 root。
questions.explanation_zh: realpath 会规范化路径。Sandbox 不会一律拒绝 .. token,而是检查解析后的目标。这是有意为之: 合法路径有时确实会经过 ..。
